productDisplayName: Nike Fragrances Men Urban Musk Perfume 75 ml
description: For the urban tough talker, this nike fragrances Urban Musk fragrance for men is inspired by the musky tones - a love-forever classic. Reminiscent of career men and the retro-esque mood of the moment, this eau de toilette, bottled in a delectable flask, is best for formal outings and beach wear.Caution: Flammable, Keep away from sources of ignition, Keep away from children. Do not use near fire, flame or heat, Avoid spraying near the eyes
